svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram name="Signal path" id="signal-path"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="500" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="280" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="raw" value="Raw analog<br>input signal" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="160" y="40" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lpfhw" value="Low pass filter<br>(Hardware)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="40" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="adc" value="Analog to digital<br>converter (ADC)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="480" y="40" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="ainfilt" value="Low pass filter<br><b>AInFilt</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="640" y="40" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="ainoffset" value="Offset<br><b>AInOffset</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="640" y="160" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="aindb" value="Deadband filter<br><b>AInDB</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="480" y="160" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="aingain" value="Gain scaling<br><b>AInGain</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="160" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="ainmute" value="2nd Deadband filter<br><b>AInMuteRange</b>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="160" y="160" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="ainport" value="AInPort" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="0" y="160" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="raw" target="lpfhw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="lpfhw" target="adc"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="adc" target="ainfilt"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ainfilt" target="ainoffset"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ainoffset" target="aindb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="aindb" target="aingain"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="aingain" target="ainmute"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e7" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ainmute" target="ainport"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
